CreateAlarmTemplate.name: Template name
CreateAlarmTemplate.rules.conditions: Condition list within a rule (AND logic)
CreateAlarmTemplate.rules.pendingCount: Consecutive trigger count, value range: greater than 0

CreateAlarmTemplate.rules.content: Alarm condition description (returned in query response only)
